channel.title: +shAnkaras on विश्वासस्य जालक्षेत्रम् Vishvas's website
channel.description: Recent content in +shAnkaras on विश्वासस्य जालक्षेत्रम् Vishvas's website

item.title: 2026-04-25 shankara on viShNu Aditya
item.description:
Per shankara, viShNu nArAyaNa = viShNu Aditya, distinct from arjuna, ravi / sun etc..

Source: TW

विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

00:00 - mangalam 00:20 - Intro, shrI jammalamadaka-shrInivAsa hosted by aham brahmAsmi foundation of shRngeri pITha. 01:00 - shankara was not “popular vaiShNava”? 01:24 - “Popular” vaiShNava meaning 02:15 - shrI jammalamadaka-shrInivAs’s claim from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fQi3LkrZ74E&t=749s 04:50 - wikipedia on the Aditya (son of aditi) viShNu 05:50 - shankara’s understanding matches. 06:25 - kRhSNa is controller of mAya, is saguNa brahma, distinct from jIva arjuna etc. in vyAvahArika-sattA. avatAra vs rebirth. 07:25 - “AdityAnAm ahaM viShNuH” - same sense as “vRShNInAM vAsudevo smi” 09:20 - shrI jammalamadaka-shrInivAsa’s mistake propogation, retreat from challenge claiming “non-relevance” - https://x.com/jamvasu/status/2047895453887578294 . 10:20 - Conclusion, recap. bhAShya should be clear by itself; but being twisted.
